title: Knoten Documentation
description: How to use and understand Knoten — the static architecture and database visualiser for Laravel projects.
linkRule: Each page's route is '/' followed by its slug (e.g. '/opening-projects'); a slug is the filename with the leading 'NN-' prefix and the '.md' extension removed. The home page (README.md) is served at '/'. In-body Markdown links between pages are already written as absolute '/slug' routes, so no link rewriting is needed.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.description: What Knoten is, and how to get it running.
